name: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Premium over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and Hi-Res Audio support. Perfect for music lovers and remote workers alike.

name: 4K Ultra HD Smart TV — 55"
description: Crystal-clear 4K display with HDR10+, built-in streaming apps, and voice control. Transform your living room into a home cinema.

name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
description: Tactile RGB mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX switches, per-key customizable lighting, and a durable aluminum frame built for competitive gaming.

name: Smartwatch Pro Series 5
description: Advanced health monitoring with ECG, blood oxygen tracking, GPS, and a stunning always-on AMOLED display. Water-resistant up to 50 metres.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: 360-degree surround sound, IPX7 waterproof rating, and 24-hour playback. The perfect companion for outdoor adventures.

name: Men's Slim-Fit Chinos
description: Crafted from stretch-cotton blend for all-day comfort. Available in multiple colours, these chinos transition effortlessly from office to weekend.

name: Women's Running Jacket
description: Lightweight, wind-resistant jacket with reflective details and a packable design. Ideal for early-morning runs and outdoor training sessions.

name: Classic White Sneakers
description: Timeless minimalist design with premium leather upper and memory-foam insoles. A versatile pair that pairs well with any outfit.

name: Merino Wool Crew-Neck Jumper
description: Luxuriously soft 100% merino wool jumper. Naturally temperature-regulating, odour-resistant, and available in a range of seasonal colours.

name: Denim Jacket — Vintage Wash
description: Classic trucker-style denim jacket with a lived-in vintage wash. Rugged, stylish, and built to last through every season.

name: Clean Code
description: Robert C. Martin's seminal guide to writing readable, maintainable, and elegant software. A must-read for every serious software engineer.

name: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
description: Martin Kleppmann's deep dive into the principles and practices behind reliable, scalable, and maintainable data systems.

name: Atomic Habits
description: James Clear's practical framework for building good habits and breaking bad ones — backed by science and packed with actionable strategies.

name: The Pragmatic Programmer
description: Andrew Hunt and David Thomas's timeless guide to software craftsmanship, covering tips and practices that remain relevant across every technology era.

name: You Don't Know JS (Series)
description: Kyle Simpson's renowned six-book series that digs deep into the core mechanisms of JavaScript — a definitive resource for serious JS developers.

name: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: Fully adjustable lumbar support, breathable mesh back, and 4D armrests. Designed for long hours of comfortable, posture-friendly sitting.

name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle — 1L
description: Double-walled vacuum insulation keeps drinks cold for 24 hours and hot for 12. BPA-free, leak-proof lid, and fits most cup holders.

name: Non-Stick Cookware Set — 5 Piece
description: PFOA-free ceramic non-stick coating with heat-resistant handles. Suitable for all hob types including induction. Dishwasher safe.

name: Bamboo Cutting Board Set
description: Set of 3 eco-friendly bamboo cutting boards in graduated sizes. Naturally antimicrobial, gentle on knife edges, and easy to maintain.

name: Aromatherapy Diffuser
description: Ultrasonic cool-mist diffuser with 7-colour LED mood lighting, 4 timer settings, and whisper-quiet operation. Covers rooms up to 30 m².
